newsItems.title: FPS Rides on Strength in Data Center Vertical: Will it Drive Revenues?
newsItems.summary: FPS rides the AI-driven data center boom, with surging demand for power infrastructure fueling rapid revenue growth and positioning it for long-term gains.

newsItems.summary: Vertiv (VRT) has been one of the stocks most watched by Zacks.com users lately. So, it is worth exploring what lies ahead for the stock.

newsItems.title: OpenAI miss sparks sell-off for Oracle, Nvidia, CoreWeave stocks
newsItems.summary: Yahoo Finance Senior Producer John Hyland takes a look at why tech names tied to OpenAI (OPAI.PVT) are under pressure. That list includes Oracle (ORCL), Nvidia (NVDA), and CoreWeave (CRWV). The pullback follows a Wall Street Journal report that OpenAI is expected to miss internal
